verses.text: “Mawhna hanga biakna ngeina, a siangtho pen hih bang ahi hi
Amaute in meihal biakna a gawhna mun uhah mawhna hanga biakna go ding uh a, biakna tau kimkotah a si kitheh ding hi
Tua ciangin a thau khempeuh, a meithau, a gilpi tuam a thau
a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sin tuamte kipia ding hi
Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding a, tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi
Siampite lakah pasal peuhmah in a siangtho mun khatah ne thei ding uh hi; tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi
“Mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a, tuate-a' ding a ngeina a kibang hi ding a, kilemna a bawlsak siampipa in tua biakna sa ngah ding hi
Mi khatpeuh' meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna a vun ngah ding hi
Mei bung sunga a ki-em an tawh biakna peuhmah leh sikbeel dai ahi a, beelpei tungah ahi zongin a kibawl khempeuhte, a pia siampipa in ngah ding hi
An tawh biakna khempeuh, sathau a kihel hita leh a kihello hita leh, Aaron' suan khempeuh in a kikimin hawm ding uh hi
“Mi khatpeuh in Topa' tungah a piak theih ding, thunuama biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi
Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh, silngo sawhloh sathau tawh a kihel moh, silngo sawhloh mohpheng sathau tawh a kizut, annel moh sathau limtakin a kihelte, lungdam biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi
Amah in lungdam kohna dingin thunuama ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi
Amah in Topa biakna dingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding a, thunuama biakna si a theh siampipa in tua moh ngah ding hi
Lungdam kohna-in thunuama ama biakpiakna a sa pen a piak ni-in kine ding a, a zingsang dong bangmah kisitlo ding hi
“Ahih hangin ama biakpiakna pen thuciamna hanga biakpiakna ahi a, utthu-a biakpiakna ahi zongin ahih leh, amah in a biakpiakna a piak ni-in kine ding a, a omlai teng a zing ciangin kine ding hi
Ahih hangin a ni thum ni-in biakpiakna sa a omlai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi

A ni thum ni-in thunuama ama biakpiakna sa khat peuhpeuh a kinek leh, tua biakpiakna a piapa kisanglo ding a, tua pen ama-a'-in zong kiciamtehlo ding hi. Tua sa a nin hi ding a, a nepa in ama mawhna pua ding hi
“A nin na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kisawhkha sa kinelo ding a, mei tawh kihal ding hi. Ahi zongin a siang mi khempeuh in a sa ne thei ding uh hi
A nin hi napi-in thunuama Topa' tungah biakpiakna sa a nepa ama mipihte' lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi

Mi khatpeuh in mihing nin hita leh ganhing nin hita leh a kihhuai a nin khat peuhpeuh hita leh lawng a, tua khit ciangin thunuama Topa' tungah biakpiakna sa a nek leh, ama mipihte' lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin a thau na ne kei ding uh hi
A mawk sih ganhing thau leh gamsate in a balgawp ganhing thaute, nadangin kizang thei ding a, ahih hangin bangbang hi leh na ne kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ganhing thau a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihte' lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi
Tua thamloin note in na ten'na uh mun khat peuhpeuhah vasa sisan hita leh ganhing sisan hita leh si peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi
Si khat peuhpeuh a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihte' lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa' tungah thunuama ama biakpiakna a piapa in Topa' kiangah ama biakna paipih ding hi. Thunuama ama biakpiakna panin
amah in Topa' tungah meihal biakna a khutin paipih ding hi. Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna dingin a iik a kivei theihna dingin amah in a thau a iik tawh paipih ding hi
Siampipa in biakna tau tungah a thau hal ding a, ahih hangin a iik pen Aaron leh a suante-a' ding hi ding hi
Thunuama na biakpiakna panin biakna-in siampipa tungah a taklam phei na pia ding uh hi
Aaron' suante sung panin thunuama biakna si leh a thau a piapa in a taklam phei a ngah ding ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh a kivei a iik leh a kipia a phei pen keimah in Israel mite' tung panin thunuama amau' biakpiakna sung panin lakhia-in, Israel mite' tung panin a tawntungin a ngah dingun siampi Aaron leh a suante' tungah ka pia khinzo hi
Hih pen, Topa' siampi na a sem dingin amaute a kipiak ni-in, Topa' tungah meihal biakna sung panin amau' tungah a kipia, Aaron leh a suante' tanh ahi hi
Israel mite in amaute tungah a piakna dingin amaute sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa in hih thu pia a, tua pen a khang tawntungun amau' kaih ahi hi,” a ci hi

Hihte pen amau' biaknate Topa' tungah a piakna dingun amah in Israel mite Sinai sehnel gamah a thupiak ni-in Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses a thupiak, meihal biakna, an tawh biakna, khialhna hanga biakna, mawhna hanga biakna, ki-apna leh thunuama biakna ngeina ahi hi.
